title: Thailand to Expand Cross-Border Digital Payment Links, BOT Says
title_zh: 【电子钱包/监管】泰国推进跨境数字支付与 BOT 表态
summary: The Nation reports Bank of Thailand plans to widen cross-border digital payment connectivity for trade and travel.
summary_zh: The Nation 报道 泰国银行（BOT） 拟扩大跨境数字支付 能力，与旅游与贸易 需求联动。

title: Report Declares Thai Digital Economy Still Robust
title_zh: 【市场/支付】研究称泰国数字经济与线上商业仍具韧性
summary: Bangkok Post covers research highlighting e-commerce, video commerce, and service platforms supporting Thailand’s digital growth.
summary_zh: Bangkok Post 引述研究，强调 电商、视频电商与 O2O 服务 对泰国 数字经济体量 的支撑。

title: Thailand’s Digital Payment Revolution: PromptPay Dominance
title_zh: 【电子钱包】The Nation：PromptPay 与泰国数字支付变革
summary: Feature on PromptPay scale and how national QR and mobile rails reshape payments across Thailand and the region.
summary_zh: 专题称 PromptPay 规模化 与 国统一二维码 正在重塑个人与商户侧支付行为。

title: 2C2P to Invest 1.5bn Baht in Region’s Fintech Ecosystem
title_zh: 【市场】2C2P 投资区域金融科技生态，强化支付与商户服务
summary: Bangkok Post reports 2C2P’s capital plan to deepen Thailand and regional fintech, focusing on digital payments and SME enablement.
summary_zh: 媒体报道支付服务商 2C2P 的资本投入 计划，与区域支付/商户数字化 相关。

title: Fintech in Thailand: BOT Portal on Digital Finance Innovation
title_zh: 【监管】泰国银行：金融科技与数字金融信息门户
summary: Bank of Thailand outlines innovation agenda, including sandbox, payment systems, and responsible fintech growth.
summary_zh: BOT 官方页介绍创新监管、支付体系 与责任金融科技发展 路径，为本地监测基线。

title: How to Prevent Thai Fintech from a Premature Death
title_zh: 【监管/行业】Techsauce：避免泰国金融科技“早衰”的要素
summary: Techsauce long-read on financial inclusion, innovation incentives, and regulatory balance for the Thai fintech market.
summary_zh: 长文讨论 普惠、监管与商业可持续 三角关系，为理解泰国政策语境提供参考。

title: Bettr and Embedded Lending: MSME Financing in Thailand
title_zh: 【数字信贷】Techsauce：Bettr 与场景内信贷赋能泰国 SME
summary: Profile of digital lending and embedded models targeting Thai MSME financing gaps and alternative data use cases.
summary_zh: 介绍面向中小微的嵌入式信贷 与 替代数据 在风控中的行业讨论。

title: The Future of Fintech in SEA: Thailand in Regional Context
title_zh: 【市场】东南亚金融科技未来视角（含泰国相关讨论）
summary: HSBC-quoted perspectives on how hubs like Singapore and regional banks mentor Thai-linked innovation.
summary_zh: 区域视角下讨论银行合作、人才与政策 对含泰国在内的东南亚 fintech 影响。

title: An In-Depth Look at the Thai Fin-Tech Club and Sandbox Culture
title_zh: 【监管】泰国 Fin-Tech Club 与沙盒文化始末（行业稿）
summary: Techsauce on Thai fintech community initiatives including sandbox pilots and early ecosystem building blocks.
summary_zh: 历史稿回顾 沙盒、孵化与业协 在泰国 fintech 起步期的作用。

title: LINE BK Five Years: From In-App Bank to “Everyday Financial Partner”
title_zh: 【数字银行】Brand Inside：LINE BK 五周年与日常金融伙伴定位
summary: Brand story on LINE BK’s user journey, social-banking model, and integration with KBank joint venture services.
summary_zh: 品牌稿梳理 LINE BK 与 社交银行 路径及与 Kasikornbank 合作 叙事。

title: From Social Banking to Lending Growth: LINE BK Market Narrative
title_zh: 【数字银行/现金贷】LINE BK 社交银行向个贷与增长延伸
summary: Media analysis of how LINE BK expands from deposits and daily banking into broader lending and cross-sell.
summary_zh: 分析 LINE BK 从存汇 向信贷与保险等交叉销售 的延伸逻辑（以该稿观点为准）。

title: Kasikornbank and LINE: Launch Narrative of LINE BK Social Banking
title_zh: 【数字银行】开泰与 LINE 推出 LINE BK 的历史叙事
summary: Retrospective on joint venture structure and in-chat financial transactions in Thailand’s first wave of neobank-style apps.
summary_zh: 回顾 合资架构与在聊天内完成存贷汇 的早期产品故事。

title: E-Commerce and BNPL Checkout Competition Heats Up in Thailand
title_zh: 【BNPL】电商分期与后付在泰国收单与商户侧竞逐
summary: MoneyGuru and comparators run evergreen guides on card vs installment vs BNPL at major Thai e-commerce checkouts, relevant to Atome, ShopBack and bank 0% plans.
summary_zh: 泰文产品比较站持续更新 信用卡、分期 0% 与 BNPL 的费率与使用场景，与头部平台大促同频。

title: Fintech and Universal Inclusion: How Digital Rails Reach the Underbanked
title_zh: 【监管/现金贷】社论再议金融科技与「合法借贷教育」的关联
summary: Op-ed framework often cited alongside enforcement stories on unlicensed apps (แอปเงินกู้เถื่อน); readers cross-check with BOT registries and police alerts.
summary_zh: 与执法报道并读时，可强调持牌机构、透明费率与可负担性 相对非法高利贷 App 的边界。

title: Thailand and China: Cross-Border QR Payment Coverage Widens
title_zh: 【电子钱包】泰中跨境二维码支付与旅游场景合作
summary: The Nation on bilateral initiatives linking mobile wallets and QR for tourists and small traders across borders.
summary_zh: 双边 二维码互通 方便旅泰游客与华商人 小额收付。

title: Crypto Tap-to-Pay and Travel-Linked Payment Innovation in 2025
title_zh: 【电子钱包】旅业场景中的加密/新型支付与 tap-to-pay 宣传稿
summary: Bangkok Post PR feature on next-gen payment UX for travel; adjacent to e-wallet, QR, and card innovations in Thailand’s payment stack.
summary_zh: 以旅业支付体验 为切口介绍创新收单/钱包能力，可与 PromptPay+国际卡+钱包 框架对照阅读。

title: Bank of Thailand Calls for Data-Sharing Framework to Unlock Financial Inclusion
title_zh: 【监管/现金贷】泰国银行呼吁数据共享框架以改善普惠与授信可得性
summary: The Nation reports BOT’s push for consent-based data portability to help lenders assess risk and support inclusion—relevant to legal vs shadow lending app debates.
summary_zh: The Nation 报道 同意制数据共享/可携 对反欺诈、授信可得与普惠 意义，可间接帮助借款人识别持牌个贷与非法平台 差异。

title: Thai Virtual Banks: CP All Restructuring Under Regulatory Spotlight
title_zh: 【数字银行】CP All 虚拟银行重组与监管关注
summary: Bangkok Post on shareholder votes and board moves tied to a planned virtual-banking venture under evolving BOT guidance.
summary_zh: 英媒跟进五家虚银格局 下，股东与治理解构对进度与资本路径 影响。

title: KBank, SCB and Incumbents Posture on Cards and Super-App Wallets
title_zh: 【信用卡】大行走访稿：用卡、里程与手机银行/钱包的协同
summary: Thairath’s money vertical regularly covers co-brand cards, air-mile promotions, and competition from e-wallets and BNPL at checkouts.
summary_zh: ไทยรัฐ 财经子站持续更新 联名卡、里程与 0% 分期 及与 超级 App+BNPL 的竞合。

title: Digital Payments Fuel Sustainable Growth as Thai Tourism Revenue Rises
title_zh: 【电子钱包】数字支付与旅游收入回升下的可持续增长叙事
summary: The Nation article linking wider digital payment adoption to tourism and SME ticket sizes during recovery cycles.
summary_zh: 将 外卡+小额电子支付 与 旅游与小微场景 联动，为支付渗透率提供宏观侧写。

title: ShopBack PayLater: Thailand Landing Page and Merchant Onboarding
title_zh: 【BNPL】ShopBack PayLater 泰国落地页与商户/用户入口
summary: Official ShopBack pay-later product page for Thailand outlines partner merchants and in-app pay-later use cases in retail and e-commerce.
summary_zh: 从第一方产品页 可核对适用商户、期数/费项与活动规则，再与 银行分期 交叉比较。

title: Jitta Wealth Takes Thai FinTech to the World
title_zh: 【市场】Jitta Wealth 与泰国金融科技“走出去”
summary: Techsauce interview on a Thai wealthtech’s global product strategy—context for capital-markets fintech and retail investor education.
summary_zh: 以财富科技 个案补全 支付/信贷之外 的 fintech 光谱，与 SEC 披露与适当性 并读。

title: SEC Thailand Digital Asset and Capital Markets Innovation
title_zh: 【监管】泰国 SEC 数字资产与资本市场创新页面
summary: SEC portal for token offerings, market intermediaries, and disclosure rules—adjacent to broader fintech capital formation.
summary_zh: 与 BOT 支付/信贷 并列的证券型创新 监管侧入口，利于交叉监测。

title: New Sandbox Participants: Thai Fintech Pilots in Payments and Data
title_zh: 【监管】沙盒新一批试点与支付/数据创新（以 BOT 公告为准）
summary: Official BOT page on the regulatory sandbox where approved fintechs test new products with supervised parameters.
summary_zh: 通过沙盒 在受控环境 内试点 支付、KYC/数据、开放银行相关服务。

title: Beyond the QR Code: Thailand’s Digital Finance and Regional Linkages
title_zh: 【电子钱包】从 QR 到区域联动：泰国数字金融随笔
summary: Blog on PromptPay, cross-border linkages, and mBridge/Ensemble type experiments mentioned in public discourse.
summary_zh: 将 PromptPay、区域二维码互联 与 批发侧 CBDC/项目讨论 置于同一产业读物语境。

title: PAYPAYA (เพย์พาญ่า): Legal Cash Loan App by Akulaku X under SCBX Group
title_zh: 【PAYPAYA】เพย์พาญ่า：Akulaku X（SCBX集团）旗下合法现金贷App正式运营
summary: PAYPAYA (เพย์พาญ่า), operated by Akulaku X Co., Ltd. under SCBX group, offers personal cash loans of 1,000-50,000 THB with max 33% APR, regulated by Bank of Thailand.
summary_zh: PAYPAYA（เพย์พาญ่า）由 SCBX 集团旗下 Akulaku X Co., Ltd. 运营，提供 1,000-50,000 泰铢个人现金贷款，最高年化 33%，受泰国银行（BOT）监管，仅需身份证即可在线申请。

title: PAYPAYA Prompt Cash: Fast Approval Personal Loan in 5 Minutes
title_zh: 【PAYPAYA】Prompt Cash产品上线：5分钟审批的个人快速贷款
summary: Paypaya Prompt Cash product allows Thai nationals aged 20-60 to apply for cash loans using only national ID card, with approval as fast as 5 minutes and no prepayment penalty.
summary_zh: Paypaya Prompt Cash 产品面向 20-60 岁泰国公民，仅需一张身份证即可申请，最快 5 分钟审批放款，支持提前还款无罚金，额度最高 50,000 泰铢。

title: SCBX Official Website: Fintech Holding Group Behind PAYPAYA and MoneyThunder
title_zh: 【PAYPAYA】SCBX 集团官网：PAYPAYA（Akulaku X）与 MoneyThunder 等子公司的母公司平台
summary: SCBX official corporate website showing the group structure including Akulaku X (PAYPAYA), ABACUS digital (MoneyThunder), Card X, AutoX, SCB bank and other subsidiaries under the fintech holding company reformed from Siam Commercial Bank.
summary_zh: SCBX 集团官方网站，展示旗下子公司架构，包括 Akulaku X（PAYPAYA）、ABACUS digital（MoneyThunder）、Card X、AutoX、SCB 银行等。SCBX 由泰国汇商银行重组而成的金融科技控股平台。

title: PAYPAYA เพย์พาญ่า App Review: User Experience and Legal Lending
title_zh: 【PAYPAYA】เพย์พาญ่า用户体验评测：合法借贷App的使用反馈
summary: User reviews of PAYPAYA app highlight fast approval, credit limits up to 50,000 THB, legitimate BOT-regulated status, and convenient repayment options via bank transfer and convenience stores.
summary_zh: 用户评测显示 PAYPAYA 审批快速，额度可达 50,000 泰铢，受 BOT 监管的合法地位获认可，支持银行转账和便利店等多渠道还款。

title: BOT Cracks Down on Illegal Lending Apps, Promotes Legal Alternatives like PAYPAYA
title_zh: 【PAYPAYA】BOT严厉打击非法借贷App，推广PAYPAYA等合法替代方案
summary: Bank of Thailand intensifies crackdown on unlicensed lending apps (แอปเงินกู้เถื่อน) while promoting legal alternatives like PAYPAYA, MoneyThunder, and FINNIX as BOT-regulated options.
summary_zh: 泰国银行加大对未持牌借贷 App（แอปเงินกู้เถื่อน）的打击力度，同时推广 PAYPAYA、MoneyThunder、FINNIX 等 BOT 监管下的合法借贷替代方案。

title: MoneyThunder (เงินทันเด้อ): ABACUS/SCBX Legal Nano-Finance App on App Store
title_zh: 【PAYPAYA竞品】MoneyThunder（เงินทันเด้อ）：SCBX 系纳米金融 App Store 页面与产品信息
summary: MoneyThunder (เงินทันเด้อ), operated by ABACUS digital under SCBX group, is a BOT-supervised nano-finance app offering loans up to 20,000 THB at max 36% APR. As a sister product to PAYPAYA under the same SCBX ecosystem.
summary_zh: MoneyThunder（เงินทันเด้อ）由 SCBX 旗下 ABACUS digital 运营，是 BOT 监管的纳米金融 App，额度最高 20,000 泰铢，年化最高 36%。与 PAYPAYA 同属 SCBX 生态系统。

title: กู้เงินถูกกฎหมาย 2026: Top Legal Lending Apps in Thailand Ranked
title_zh: 【PAYPAYA】2026年泰国合法借贷App排行：กู้เงินถูกกฎหมาย完整指南
summary: Overview of legal lending apps certified by Bank of Thailand for 2026, including PAYPAYA, MoneyThunder, FINNIX, EASY, and A money, with comparison of rates, limits, and features.
summary_zh: 2026年泰国 BOT 认证合法借贷 App 汇总：PAYPAYA、MoneyThunder、FINNIX、EASY、A money 等，从利率、额度和功能等维度对比分析。

title: Akulaku X Leverages Southeast Asia Experience for Thailand PAYPAYA Expansion
title_zh: 【PAYPAYA】Akulaku X借助东南亚经验拓展泰国PAYPAYA业务
summary: Akulaku X brings digital lending expertise from Indonesia and Philippines markets to Thailand through PAYPAYA brand, targeting underbanked consumers with mobile-first cash loan products under BOT regulation.
summary_zh: Akulaku X 将其在印尼和菲律宾积累的数字借贷经验引入泰国市场，通过 PAYPAYA 品牌以移动优先的现金贷产品服务传统银行未覆盖的消费者群体。

title: BOT Digital Personal Loan Framework: Enabling Apps like PAYPAYA and SiamDL
title_zh: 【PAYPAYA】BOT数字个贷框架解读：PAYPAYA、SiamDL等App的监管基础
summary: Tilleke & Gibbins analysis of BOT's digital personal loan regulations introduced in 2020, which enable apps like PAYPAYA and SiamDL to offer fully online lending with max combined rate of 25% for this license category.
summary_zh: Tilleke & Gibbins 解读 BOT 于 2020 年推出的数字个人贷款监管框架，该框架为 PAYPAYA、SiamDL 等全线上放贷 App 提供了牌照与合规基础，该类别综合利率上限为 25%。
